channel.title: Downloads on Pi Stack
channel.description: Recent content in Downloads on Pi Stack

item.title: qBittorrent vs Deluge vs rTorrent: Best Self-Hosted Torrent Client 2026
item.description:
Why Self-Host Your Torrent Client

Running your own torrent client on a home server or VPS gives you full control over downloads, bandwidth allocation, and file management. Unlike cloud-based alternatives, a self-hosted setup keeps your data private, avoids subscription fees, and integrates seamlessly with media automation pipelines like Sonarr, Radarr, and Bazarr.
